name: Premium Rewards Elite Credit Card
effective_cost: Moderate: $570 in potential credits can more than cover the fee if you use the airline, lifestyle, and Global Entry/TSA credits

verdict.text: Keep if you'll use multiple Priority Pass memberships; steep fee otherwise

earn_note: Same 2x/2x/1.5x structure as the regular Premium Rewards card. The Elite tier's value is almost entirely in the credits and Priority Pass access, not a richer earn rate. Enrolled BofA Rewards members get a 10–75% bonus on top of these rates depending on combined deposit/investment balance. Redeeming points for airfare also gets a 20% discount versus paying cash.

redemption_options.method: Deposit to a Bank of America checking or savings account
Statement credit against travel purchases, or gift cards

points.note: The 20% airfare discount when redeeming points is the best play here; it's the only redemption path on this card that beats a flat 1¢/point. Otherwise value tops out around 1¢/point, since there's no transfer-partner program.

transfer_partners.highlight: No transfer partners: points redeem directly for cash, a 20%-discounted airfare purchase, travel statement credit, or gift cards.

credits.name: Airline Incidental Statement Credit
credits.subtitle: auto-applies · seat upgrades, bags, in-flight, lounge fees
credits.description: Up to $300 annually in statement credits for qualifying airline incidental purchases: seat upgrades, baggage fees, in-flight services, and airline lounge day-pass fees.
tips: Triple the limit on the regular Premium Rewards card ($100 vs. $300).

credits.name: Lifestyle Statement Credit
credits.subtitle: auto-applies · streaming, food delivery, fitness, rideshare
credits.description: Up to $150 annually in statement credits for video streaming services, food delivery, fitness subscriptions, and rideshare services.
tips: The broadest of the three credits, covering everyday recurring subscriptions rather than only travel-specific spend.

credits.name: Global Entry / TSA PreCheck Credit
credits.subtitle: $120 · every 4 years
credits.description: Statement credit covering the application fee (up to $120) for Global Entry or TSA PreCheck, once every 4 years, when the fee is charged to this card. Shown here amortized to an annual figure.
tips: Apply for Global Entry rather than just TSA PreCheck; it includes TSA PreCheck and still qualifies for this credit.

insurance.detail: Covered: exact dollar limits are in the Guide to Benefits, not public marketing
Covered: exact dollar limits are in the Guide to Benefits, not public marketing
Covered: exact dollar limits are in the Guide to Benefits, not public marketing
Covered: exact dollar limits are in the Guide to Benefits, not public marketing
Covered: exact dollar limits are in the Guide to Benefits, not public marketing
Covered: exact terms are in the Guide to Benefits, not public marketing
Covered (Purchase Security): exact limits are in the Guide to Benefits, not public marketing
Covered (Warranty Manager Service): exact limits are in the Guide to Benefits, not public marketing
Not responsible for fraudulent transactions once reported

protection_note: Same confirmed travel-insurance and purchase-protection categories as the regular Premium Rewards card (trip delay/cancellation/interruption, baggage, lost luggage, emergency evacuation, Return Protection, Purchase Security). Bank of America doesn't publish whether Elite gets higher dollar limits, so treat these as at least as good as the $95 card's, not confirmed better.
rental_note: Auto Rental Collision Damage Waiver is included, plus 24/7 Roadside Dispatch; exact coverage terms aren't published publicly.

status_perks.name: Priority Pass Select
status_perks.note: Up to 4 complimentary Priority Pass Select memberships: enough to cover a primary cardholder plus 3 authorized users, or one person's repeated guest visits, without buying extra memberships.

services.name: 75,000-point welcome bonus
services.detail: A $750 value, after $5,000 in purchases within the first 90 days.

services.name: 24/7 full-service concierge
services.detail: Book travel, dinner reservations, and event tickets through a dedicated concierge line.

services.name: Visa Signature Luxury Hotel Collection
services.detail: Room upgrades, late checkout, and other perks when booking through the Visa Signature Luxury Hotel Collection.

services.name: No foreign transaction fees
services.detail: $0 on purchases made outside the US.

services.name: BofA Rewards bonus
services.detail: 10% (Member), 25% (Preferred Plus), 50% (Preferred Honors), or 75% (Premier) bonus on points earned, based on combined Bank of America/Merrill balance.

additional_cards.title: Authorized users

benefits.text: Earns points on their spend (into your account)
Can be one of the up-to-4 complimentary Priority Pass memberships

additional_cards.note: No cost to add, and unlike many premium cards, authorized users can share in the complimentary Priority Pass memberships rather than needing their own paid enrollment.
